# Test generate-fake-server fails for main packages

muxt generate

! muxt generate-fake-server .

stderr 'package is main'

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.24
-- template.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*.gohtml"))
-- index.gohtml --
{{define "GET /{$}"}}
<h1>Hello</h1>
{{end}}
